questionHtml:
The student uses this model to predict the population of Canada in the year 2030, where t=30, and calculates a population of approximately 41.3 million people.

Comment on the reliability of the student’s prediction.
markschemeHtml:
It is unreliable because 2030 is outside the range of data (extrapolation).          A1

[1 mark]

meta.title: Comment on the reliability of the student’s prediction.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.4—Pearsons, scatter diagrams, eqn of y on x
